heroText: Official website of opera singer Vitaly Yushmanov. Explore schedule, news, repertoire, media appearances, and contact information.

news.title: Japan Tour 2026 announced
news.body: Spring tour dates are now available for Tokyo, Osaka, and Nagoya.

news.title: New CD release
news.body: A new album featuring Russian romances and German lieder is now available.

news.title: Masterclass in Tokyo
news.body: A vocal masterclass for young singers will be held this season.

biography: Vitaly Yushmanov is an internationally active baritone, performing opera, song recitals, and sacred repertoire across Europe and Japan.
media: Performance videos on official YouTube channel
